Los Angeles in California is noted for the Hollywood Walk of Fame and Rodeo Drive, which are more related to entertainment and shopping. Now, looking at the options: Option A: The Grand Canyon and Rodeo Drive. The Grand Canyon is a natural site, good for nature lovers, but Rodeo Drive is a shopping area in LA, which doesn't relate to nature or history. So this might not be the best fit. So this might not be the right choice either. Option C: White House and Arizona. The White House is in Washington, D.C., which is a major historical site. Arizona is home to the Grand Canyon, a natural attraction. So this combines both history and nature. Option D: C and The Grand Canyon.
